description_long: This is a vintage-style electronic keyboard instrument with a rectangular body featuring a combination of wood and metal materials. The front panel is equipped with a series of black and white piano keys, as well as multiple control knobs, switches, and buttons, some of which are illuminated in green. The side panels are painted a bold red, adding a striking contrast to the otherwise muted color palette. The top and rear surfaces are finished in a polished wood grain, with a metallic plate and a label visible on the back. The overall design suggests a classic synthesizer or organ, likely used for musical performances or studio work.
description: A vintage electronic keyboard with wood, metal, and red side panels, featuring piano keys and multiple control knobs and switches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, control panel with knobs, switches, and illuminated buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red side panel and the depth of the keyboard body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wood grain back, a metallic plate, and a label.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the red side panel and the keyboard's profile.
